Faq

faq.Rmd

Frequently Asked Questions and Tips

Frequently asked questions

Can Projects include multiple methods?

  • Yes, Projects can include multiple methods.

Can Syntheses include multiple methods?

  • No, Synthesis must only contain one method. Separate Syntheses must be made for different methods.

If I am uploading for someone else what information do I need to get from the custodian?

  • Here is a spreadsheet to get the custodian to fill out

Tips

  • Light and Dark Mode: In the top right corner of the landing page you can click the ☼ to switch between light and dark mode

On this page
